# Locally Uncensored

> All-in-one local AI desktop app for uncensored chat, image generation, and video creation.

Locally Uncensored is a free, open-source (MIT) desktop application that combines AI chat, image generation, and video creation in one interface. It runs 100% locally on your machine using Ollama for text generation and ComfyUI for image/video generation.

## Key Facts
- Name: Locally Uncensored
- Type: Desktop AI Application
- License: MIT (free and open source)
- Platforms: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Tech Stack: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Vite, Tauri v2
- AI Backends: Ollama (text/chat), ComfyUI (images/video)
- GitHub: https://github.com/PurpleDoubleD/locally-uncensored
- Website: https://purpledoubled.github.io/locally-uncensored/
- Author: PurpleDoubleD

## What Makes It Unique
- Only local AI app combining chat + image generation + video generation in one interface
- Uses abliterated/uncensored models by default (no content restrictions)
- 25+ built-in AI personas
- One-click setup (setup.bat/setup.sh handles everything)
- One-click ComfyUI installation from within the app
- No Docker required, no cloud services, no accounts, no telemetry
- Auto-detects all installed models across Ollama and ComfyUI

## Supported Models
- Chat: Llama 3.1 8B Abliterated, Mistral Nemo 12B, Qwen 3, DeepSeek R1
- Images: Stable Diffusion XL, FLUX.1 Schnell, Juggernaut XL, Pony Diffusion
- Video: Wan 2.1/2.2, AnimateDiff v3

## Comparison
- vs Open WebUI: LU adds image + video generation, Open WebUI is chat-only
- vs LM Studio: LU is open source and adds image + video, LM Studio is closed source chat-only
- vs SillyTavern: LU has modern UI, built-in image/video gen, simpler setup
- vs ComfyUI: LU provides a simple UI without node graphs, adds chat capabilities

## Hardware Requirements
- Minimum: 8 GB RAM for text chat
- Recommended: NVIDIA GPU with 8+ GB VRAM for image generation
- Video generation: 10-12 GB VRAM recommended
